question: [File: 'File Name: rest/server.js -> Scope: Medium: A bug in the respective layer 0/1/2 network code that results in unintended smart contract behavior with no concrete funds at direct risk'] [Function: createTerminus(server, {...})] Can an unprivileged external user repeatedly poll the /health/readiness or /health/liveness endpoints to infer the internal state of the smart contract query infrastructure (e.g., database availability), using this information to time attacks against ContractRoutes during degraded states?
